latest.title: Trees pump water uphill without pumps
latest.script_key: watch this one twice those leaves aren t just for shade they pull water up 300 feet against gravity no pump needed tiny tubes in the bark pull moisture through like a straw that s why the whole tree stays alive what s the tallest tree you ve ever stood under

latest.title: Dragonflies hunt with built-in gyroscopes
latest.script_key: watch their wings twist that little kink is a gyroscope that s why they turn mid air like fighter jets their four wings don t just flap they tilt like helicopter blades did you know their eyes wrap around their head they see in every direction at once

latest.title: Dolphins can call each other with signature whistles

latest.title: Monkeys wash food when grit gets annoying

latest.title: Penguins carry tiny air pockets into the water
